facebook.caption:
Beach club dining for $15-30 a head. At Bãi Khem. Yes, really.

Istanbul Beach Club Phú Quốc sits on one of the cleanest stretches of sand on the island. 3,350 reviews. 4.7 stars. The food holds up to both numbers.

Order, eat, swim. Repeat. This is the move for a full beach day without the resort price tag.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
